Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series West heads to Motown. Ryan Anderson brings the series points lead into round 16. However, the Koehler’s are looking for the hometown win debuting a special Avenger body, and the return of Northern Nightmare.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI

Video.summary: A huge field of some of the world's greatest freestyling monster trucks battle for a shot at victory at Alltel Stadium.
Video.title: Alltel Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: It's week 2 from the Citrus Bowl in Orlando, FL- it's about to get rowdy with Monster Jam's exciting freestyle competitions!
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into Reliant Stadium on January 12, 2013 with racing and freestyle excitement!
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Get ready for a WrestleMania-worthy beatdown as iconic wrestling-themed monster trucks lay the summer smackdown on the competition! Witness some of the most EPIC freestyles in Monster Jam history, featuring legendary machines like Goldberg, Madusa, New World Order, and the WCW Nitro Machine!
Video.title: Wrestling Freestyles Compilation

Video.summary: The Arena Championship Series West title is on the line as Earth Shaker’s Tristan England looks to clinch the series and earn an automatic bid to Monster Jam World Finals XXII when the action heats up from Broadmoor World Arena in Colorado Springs.
Video.title: Broadmoor World Arena - Colorado Springs, CO

Image.alt: Broadmoor World Arena - Colorado Springs, CO
Broadmoor World Arena - Colorado Springs, CO
Broadmoor World Arena - Colorado Springs, CO

Video.summary: Monster Jam has arrived in what is considered to be the motor sports capitol of the world, Indianapolis, Indiana.
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN

Video.summary: Part One: Monster Jam rides into the Alamodome in San Antonio, TX!
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into MetLife Stadium on June 13, 2015!
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing

Image.alt: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing

Video.summary: Strap in for some Monster Jam thrills from San Diego, California!
Video.title: Petco Park - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam is hot with excitement and the freestyle action from the Georgia Dome, on January 10, 2004.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Watch our Hot Rod Monster Trucks race for victory at Reliant Stadium in Houston, TX
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2020 season continues with a visit to Lucas Oil Stadium in Indianapolis, Indiana. The event was the 5th on Stadium Championship Series Red!
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN

Video.summary: Get ready for what has been traditionally one of the greatest freestyles of the year- from The Dome in St. Louis, MO, on February 17, 2007.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle

Image.alt: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle

Video.summary: Get ready for all the freestyle action from Reliant Stadium at Houston, TX, on January 5, 2008.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series East slip-slides its way into Gillette Stadium as Bryce Kenny looks to launch Great Clips Mohawk Warrior to back-to-back freestyle wins, as Grave Digger’s Tyler Menninga hopes his competitors don’t rain on his parade to a sixth series title.
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA

Video.summary: Don't miss all the freestyle action from the Gelredome, on September 26, 2010.
Video.title: GelreDome - Arnhem, Netherlands - Freestyle

Video.summary: On February 23, 2020, Angel Stadium is lit up once more with Monster Jam's 2020 season!
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series East returns to Houston for another carnage-filled round on some of the slickest dirt in the sport. JCB Digitron’s Tristan England looks for his first overall event win of the season, while Tom Meents looks to add to his legacy as the all-time winningest driver at Houston’s NRG Stadium.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: They're all here ready to tear it up in the RCA Dome! It's time for Monster Jam's freestyle competition.
Video.title: RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle

Video.summary: ThurderROARus returns to Ford Field as Colt Stephens looks for his second event win in Detroit. Meanwhile Chris Koehler attempts to parlay his freestyle win into an event championship win. However, Adam Anderson is mounting a comeback as he leads Grave Digger back to the top of the leaderboard.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI

Video.summary: Day two of Monster Jam's 2021 season stop in St. Louis, MO continues with more trucks and more fun!
Video.title: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: Day 2 at US Bank Stadium continues with freestyle!
Video.title: US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Image.alt: US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle
US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle
US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Second half of freestyle action from Monster Jam World Finals XIV on March 23, 2013.
Video.title: World Finals XIV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 2

Image.alt: World Finals XIV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 2
World Finals XIV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 2
World Finals XIV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 2

Video.summary: It's time for Monster Jam World Finals X! Buckle in for the racing action on March 28, 2009 in Las Vegas.
Video.title: World Finals X - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Image.alt: World Finals X - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals X - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals X - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Video.summary: Don't miss the best of El Toro Loco, Avenger, and Megalodon in this high-flying, freestylin' compilation!
Video.title: Best of El Toro Loco, Avenger, and Megalodon

Image.alt: Best of El Toro Loco, Avenger, and Megalodon
Best of El Toro Loco, Avenger, and Megalodon
Best of El Toro Loco, Avenger, and Megalodon

Video.summary: Check out this epic compilation of Grave Digger's best moments - featuring drivers Tyler Menninga, Krysten Anderson, and more over the years!
Video.title: Best of Grave Digger

Video.summary: Epic Monster Jam competition in the World Finals at Sam Boyd Stadium in Las Vegas, NV.
Video.title: Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV

Image.alt: Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV
Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV
Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2014 season revs into Sam Boyd Stadium in Las Vegas, NV for some fun and excitement!
Video.title: Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV

Image.alt: Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV
Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV
Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV

Video.summary: Monster Jam Crash Course is an all-new series bringing families up close to the competition, exclusive access to the drivers and so much more!
Video.title: Monster Jam Crash Course
